title: cuscuta iguanella
intro: Cuscuta iguanella, also known as dodder, is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by connecting to and draining the sap of other plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cuscuta iguanella include improving cardiovascular health, reducing symptoms of menopause, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Cuscuta iguanella include teas, infusions, and capsules, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effectiveness.
